narrative_summary.openrouter_grok4_mace_mp0_small_full: Attempt 1 plans ontop but slips into a hollow configuration at -4.045 eV, which remains the best valid structure; two later bridge attempts are worse, so the accidental slip is the winning move.
narrative_summary.openrouter_grok4_mace_mp0_small_no_slip: Without slip-conditioned guidance, the search spends the full five-attempt budget and ends at -3.594 eV, about 0.451 eV above openrouter_grok4_mace_mp0_small full.
narrative_summary.openrouter_gemini25pro_mace_mp0_small_fu: openrouter_gemini25pro_mace_mp0_small full reaches a best valid bridge structure at -3.841 eV on attempt 3, while later attempts find only dissociated or inferior alternatives.
narrative_summary.openrouter_gemini25pro_mace_mp0_small_no: openrouter_gemini25pro_mace_mp0_small no_forbid finds a non-dissociated hollow structure at -4.042 eV on attempt 1, outperforming openrouter_gemini25pro_mace_mp0_small full by about 0.201 eV; this is the negative result for the FORBID mechanism.
